tasks.title: Read and Understand Specification
tasks.description: Thoroughly read the assignment specification for CPSC-4420 Assignment 2 and understand all requirements and components.

tasks.title: Design A* Algorithm Structure
tasks.description: Plan the overall structure and flow of the A* search algorithm to be implemented in astar.py, including parameter handling and data structures.

tasks.title: Implement A* Core Algorithm
tasks.description: Implement the A* core algorithm in the astar.py file, including the min-heap structure and closed set to avoid revisiting states.

tasks.title: Implement 8-Puzzle State Representation
tasks.description: Create the puzzle.py file to implement the state representation of the 8-puzzle, ensuring it is hashable and can generate valid successors.

tasks.title: Write Unit Tests for A*
tasks.description: Write tests in tests.py to validate scenarios such as solving a 1-step puzzle, a 10-step puzzle, and testing for unsolvable or already-solved puzzles.

tasks.title: Implement Zero Heuristic
tasks.description: Implement the zero heuristic function (h0) in astar.py, which always returns 0.

tasks.title: Implement Misplaced Tiles Heuristic
tasks.description: Implement the misplaced tiles heuristic function (h1) in astar.py that counts tiles not in their goal position.

tasks.title: Implement Manhattan Distance Heuristic
tasks.description: Implement the Manhattan distance heuristic function (h2) in astar.py to calculate the distance each tile must travel to reach its goal.

tasks.title: Design Custom Heuristic
tasks.description: Design a custom heuristic function (h3) in astar.py that is admissible, ensuring it meets the criteria for heuristic functions.

tasks.title: Run Heuristic Evaluation Tests
tasks.description: Execute the evaluation tests provided in test_cases.py to measure nodes expanded, path lengths, and wall-clock time for each heuristic.

tasks.title: Write Heuristic Evaluation Table
tasks.description: Compile the results from the heuristic evaluation tests into a formatted table for analysis in report.pdf.

tasks.title: Write Analysis Section
tasks.description: In report.pdf, write the analysis section explaining findings on heuristics and their efficiencies based on experimental results.

tasks.title: Implement Grid-World Functionality
tasks.description: Create grid_world.py to implement the A* and Dijkstra's algorithm for navigating a weighted grid-world.

tasks.title: Load Grid and Run Algorithms
tasks.description: In grid_world.py, implement loading from grid_world.json and running both A* and Dijkstra’s algorithm.

tasks.title: Visualize Grid and Output Results
tasks.description: Visualize the grid and path using matplotlib in grid_world.py or implement ASCII art output as needed.

tasks.title: Create Command-Line Interface
tasks.description: Add command-line argument parsing in grid_world.py to accept start and goal parameters along with optional flags.

tasks.title: Write Final Report
tasks.description: Compile all findings, analysis, and processes into report.pdf, ensuring it meets the assignment constraints for length and formatting.

tasks.title: Finalize Code and Submission Package
tasks.description: Review all code and documentation, package files into a .zip file named Lastname_Firstname_A2.zip for submission.
